_note: Python tokenizer.encode(block_html, add_special_tokens=False) for feyninc/pulpie-orange-small. Swift must match exactly: a single token of drift shifts <|sep|> positions and corrupts every label after it.

The model feeds this relevant retrieved information into the LLM via prompt engineering of the user's original query. Newer implementations (as of 2023[citation needed]

• Performance improves by optimizing how vector similarities are calculated. Dot products enhance similarity scoring, while approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) searches improve retrieval efficiency over K-nearest neighbors (KNN) searches.[9]
    • ...
  • Other retrieval techniques focus on improving accuracy by refining how documents are selected. Some retrieval methods combine sparse representations, such as SPLADE, with query expansion strategies to improve search accuracy and recall.[11]
RAG does not prevent hallucinations in LLMs. According to Ars Technica, "It is not a direct solution because the LLM can still hallucinate around the source material in its response."[4]
